concept: Careless / Not Giving Attention / Lacking Care
description: Not giving sufficient attention or thought to avoiding harm or errors. 'Wuko' names the quality of carelessness—attention absent, care neglected.
sound_symbolism: The word slips past. 'Wu' begins with inattentive glide, awareness drifting. Then 'ko' catches briefly, but without holding—carelessness embodied.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'wuko telo' (careless work). Opposite of 'thesa' (careful). Names state requiring correction—carelessness causes harm.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Carelessness is absent mindfulness—the unaware mind that acts without seeing consequences.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Careless work wasted precious materials—attention was essential when resources were hard-won.
